comment: Pin full SHAs for reproducible installers. Sync policy: ascende-frontend tracks origin/enhancement/agent-streaming; ascende-deepagent tracks origin/enhancement/agent-harness-engineering (includes POST /chat/enhance-prompt; do not pin deepagent to origin/main until that route is merged). jurisprudence-search tracks origin/main and is built only as an embedded desktop payload (Next standalone inside the Electron app), not for public web hosting.
